prompt: A close-up portrait of a young woman with long, straight red hair and green eyes, posing with her hands partially covering her face in a peek-a-boo gesture. She is wearing a Y2K-style patchwork knit top with exposed stitching in shades of hot pink, magenta, and red. Her nails are manicured with a mix of red tips and pink gradients. She has chunky silver rings on her fingers and pink snap hair clips on one side of her hair. Shot during golden hour with warm, direct sunlight casting soft shadows on a plain cream-colored wall background. Aesthetic is early 2000s, vibrant, indie-sleaze, high-quality photography, shot on 35mm film, sharp focus. --ar 3:4
